stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes, what is the minimum Block Fuel required for the Commercial Air Transport flight in a Medium Range Jet Transport MRJT aeroplane, given the following information? The operator has nominated a suitable En-Route Alternate aerodrome.

Departure Taxi Fuel: 150 kg
Trip Fuel: 2101 kg
Alternate Fuel: 2046 kg
Destination Taxi Fuel: 250 kg
Average fuel flow: 3317 kg/h
Holding fuel flow: 2735 kg/h
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
